---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the Windows local-first bot
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What workflow is currently hard or missing?

## Proposed Behavior

How should the bot, tray panel, or Discord command behave?

## Windows Local-First Fit

Explain whether this should stay on the same Windows machine as Codex CLI and the local repositories.

## Safety Notes

Does this feature touch tokens, local files, Git operations, Codex auth state, Discord permissions, or automatic updates?

## Alternatives

What workaround or simpler option did you consider?
